account_appeals_subject_check.name: account_appeals_subject_check
account_appeals_subject_check.value: user_id IS NOT NULL OR identity_id IS NOT NULL

onboarding_sessions_branch_check.name: onboarding_sessions_branch_check
onboarding_sessions_branch_check.value: branch IS NULL OR branch IN ('new','self_deleted','active','suspended','banned','ousted','no_match')

notification_prefs.name: notification_prefs

uq_users_active_identity.name: uq_users_active_identity
uq_users_active_identity.where: identity_id IS NOT NULL AND account_status IN ('active','under_review','restricted','suspended')

dialer_observations_direction_check.name: dialer_observations_direction_check
dialer_observations_direction_check.value: direction IS NULL OR direction IN ('incoming','outgoing')

status_text_len.name: status_text_len
status_text_len.value: text_body IS NULL OR (length(trim(text_body)) >= 1 AND length(text_body) <= 700)

status_video_duration.name: status_video_duration
status_video_duration.value: duration_ms IS NULL OR (duration_ms > 0 AND duration_ms <= 60000)

status_media_by_type.name: status_media_by_type
status_media_by_type.value: (type = 'text' AND text_body IS NOT NULL AND media_url IS NULL) OR (type IN ('image','video') AND media_url IS NOT NULL)

activity_scope_consistency.name: activity_scope_consistency
activity_scope_consistency.value: (scope_type = 'direct' AND direct_member_low IS NOT NULL AND direct_member_high IS NOT NULL AND direct_member_low <> direct_member_high AND group_id IS NULL) OR (scope_type = 'group' AND group_id IS NOT NULL AND direct_member_low IS NULL AND direct_member_high IS NULL)

idx_businesses_gstin.name: idx_businesses_gstin
idx_businesses_gstin.where: gstin IS NOT NULL AND status != 'rejected'

idx_businesses_verified_handle.name: idx_businesses_verified_handle
idx_businesses_verified_handle.where: verified_handle IS NOT NULL AND status = 'verified'

user_reports_subject_check.name: user_reports_subject_check
user_reports_subject_check.value: reported_user_id IS NOT NULL OR reported_number_e164 IS NOT NULL
